title: Preparation of 1000X Antibiotic Stock Solution
author: NUS iGEM
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7pkhmkw

steps.title: Dilute in pure 100% ethanol for...
steps.instruction: Dilute in pure 100% ethanol for chloramphenicol or sterile deionized water for kanamycin and ampicillin.

steps.title: Syringe filter water-based antibiotic solution using a 0
steps.instruction: Syringe filter water-based antibiotic solution using a 0.22-μm filter
